code:
import io
import string

fn abs(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  while i < n
    let b1 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b1 == 32 or b1 == 9 or b1 == 10 or b1 == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut stop = i
      mut cont = true
      while cont
        if stop >= n
          cont = false
        else
          let b2 = match string.byte_at(line, stop)
          when Some(x)
            x
          when None
            -1
          end
          if b2 == 32 or b2 == 9 or b2 == 10 or b2 == 13
            cont = false
          else
            stop = stop + 1
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, stop)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        let a = abs(v)
        if not has
          best = v
          best_abs = a
          has = true
        else if a < best_abs
          best = v
          best_abs = a
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = stop
    end
  end
  print("min_abs=#{best}")
end
